intended_use: ART-Plan is a software designed to assist the contouring process of the target anatomical regions on 3D-images of cancer patients for whom radiotherapy treatment has been planned. The SmartFuse module
intended_use_full: ART-Plan is a software designed to assist the contouring process of the target anatomical regions on 3D-images of cancer patients for whom radiotherapy treatment has been planned. The SmartFuse module allows the user to register combinations of anatomical and functional images and display them with fused and non-fused displays to facilitate the comparison and delineation of image data by the user. With the Annotate module, users can edit manually and semi-automatically the contours for the regions of interest. It also allows to generate automatically, and based on medical practices, the contours for the organs at risk and healthy lymph nodes on CT images.
target_condition: cancer patients planned for radiotherapy treatment
ground_truth: The testing demonstrated acceptable contours against AAPM requirements and against MIM predicate device, but specific ground truth methodology not detailed.
other_metrics: Multiple tests reported as 'Passed' including autosegmentation performances, external contour segmentation, fusion/registration performances, and usability testing per IEC 62366, but no quantitative performance values provided.
